name: Gyomei Himejima
description:
A powerful earthquake strikes Japan, buildings fall and casualties rise. However, Gyomei will protect you from danger.

Hashira - Natural Disasters!

I might even do the demons as part of the series too if y’all want me too.

The following characters are who I’ll be including in the series, however, don’t be afraid to request any other characters.

  • Mitsuri - Zombie apocalypse ✅

  • Giyuu - Flash Flood ✅

  • Shinobu - Infectious disease ✅

  • Rengoku - World apocalypse ✅

  • Muichiro - Poisonous mist ✅

  • Gyomei - Earthquake

  • Obanai - Poisonous animal mutation

  • Sanemi - Tornados

  • Tanjiro - Asteroids

  • Zenitsu - Mega Storm

  • Inosuke - Rabies

  • Nezuko - Facility containment breach

  • Tengen - Death angels

Also credit to the amazing Rutub for helping me out with ideas for Nezuko and Tengen! ❤️

Key words: Gyomei, Himejima, Gyomei Himejima, Himejima Gyomei, Demon slayer, Kimitsu No Yaiba, Hashira, Anime, Earthquake, Natural Disaster, Survival, Stone Hashira

Hope y’all like the series, and as always I’m open to feedback and suggestion~
creator: 04Yato
